name: Grimm Stonehammer
description: A gruff but skilled dwarf blacksmith who forges the finest weapons and armor in the region.

catchphrases: A blade speaks for its maker.
Bah! That's not craftsmanship, that's garbage!
You want quality? Then you wait for quality.

goals: Create a legendary weapon worthy of the ancient masters
Pass on blacksmithing traditions to a worthy apprentice
Acquire rare ores and materials for special commissions
Maintain reputation as the best smith in the region
backstory: Grimm Stonehammer left his mountain homeland decades ago after a dispute with his clan over traditional forging methods. He settled in Millbrook and built his forge from the ground up. His weapons are sought after by adventurers and soldiers alike, though his blunt demeanor and high standards mean he refuses commissions he deems 'unworthy'. He secretly hopes to one day forge a weapon that will restore his honor with his clan.
knowledge: Weapon and armor types and their uses
Rare ores and where to find them
Local adventurers and their equipment needs
